hero.title: Connect Models with
hero.subtitle: The premier marketplace where models find agencies and agencies discover talent. Verified profiles, direct connections, zero commissions.

forModels.title: For Models
forModels.description: Create your portfolio, connect with top agencies, and find your next big opportunity.

forAgencies.title: For Agencies
forAgencies.description: Discover fresh talent, manage castings, and streamline your booking process.

instantConnections.title: Instant Connections
instantConnections.description: Direct messaging and contact exchange with verified industry professionals.

verifiedProfiles.title: Verified Profiles
verifiedProfiles.description: All profiles are verified to ensure authentic connections in the industry.

step1.title: Create Your Profile
step1.description: Sign up and build your portfolio with photos, measurements, and experience.

step2.title: Connect
step2.description: Browse and connect with models or agencies that match your criteria.

step3.title: Collaborate
step3.description: Exchange contacts, discuss opportunities, and start working together.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of models and agencies already connecting on ModelMatch

testimonials.anna: ModelMatch helped me find my dream agency in just two weeks. The platform is incredibly easy to use!
testimonials.james: We've discovered amazing talent through this platform. The verification system gives us confidence.
testimonials.maria: The micro-payment system is perfect. I only pay for what I need, when I need it.
